title: Lobby Overview
long_description: The lobby is the first stop where visitors arrive, orient themselves, and hear a quick overview of the facility.

title: Lobby Capacity Details
long_description: The lobby is also used for tour staging, where groups gather before moving to the next stop.

title: Reception Overview
long_description: This is where guests are greeted, checked in, and directed to the correct area for meetings and tours.

title: Reception Process Details
long_description: Staff verify appointments, issue visitor badges, and provide safety reminders before tours begin.

title: Demo Zone Overview
long_description: Teams use this zone to demonstrate robot mobility, perception, and mission workflows in a controlled setup.

title: Demo Sensor Details
long_description: Demonstrations often highlight sensing and autonomy concepts such as obstacle awareness and path planning.

title: Charging Station Overview
long_description: This location is where SPOT units are placed between tours for battery charging and routine readiness checks.

title: Operations Desk Overview
long_description: Operators monitor fleet status and environment telemetry from this desk during active sessions.
